sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Lake layer record for gaz_id 265561, "Roosevelt Lake", Lake, Mono County, CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":265561,"gaz_name":"Roosevelt Lake","gaz_featureclass":"Lake","fcode":39000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13307337.6507, 4621290.5244) converts to lon -119.541848, lat 38.295754, matching the file's recorded coordinate (-119.5420, 38.2954) to within ~40m.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used; no bait
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag; per CCR §7.50(a), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit is also 2 trout.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Roosevelt Lake (Region 6, Mono Co.) for fingerling-size Lahontan Cutthroat Trout under the Put and Grow program, with a stated release month range of August-September. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.
